name: Not Exactly the Nieman-Marcus Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Process the oatmeal into a fine powder using a blender or food processor and set aside.
3. Cream the butter with both sugars until smooth.
4. Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Add the vanilla and mix until combined.
6. Gradually add the flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, and oatmeal to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
7. Stir in the chocolate chips, grated Hershey bar, and nuts.
8. Roll the mixture into balls about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
9. Place the balls approximately 2 inches apart on a cookie sheet.
10. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
